/usr/bin/c++ -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/app.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/square.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/board.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/pawn.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/king.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/queen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/rook.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/knight.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/bishop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/fen.cpp.o -o chess   -L/opt/homebrew/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2_ttf/2.24.0/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2_gfx/1.0.4/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2_ttf/2.24.0/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2_gfx/1.0.4/lib -lSDL2 -lSDL2_ttf -lSDL2_gfx
